Name: Percentage of Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission out of all activity executions in the event log
Metric: Percentage of 'Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission' out of all cases

Name: Frequency of Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission occurring before SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion
Metric: Percentage of 'Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission' out of all 'SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion'

Name: Percentage of process variants containing Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission that eventually lead to SW-EIC Accept
Metric: Percentage of 'Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission' out of all 'SW-EIC Accept'

Name: Number of times Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission appears in variants with performance duration above the median variant duration
Metric: Number of 'Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission' activities

Name: Percentage of Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission followed by Manuscript Export Succeeded
Metric: Percentage of 'Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission' out of all 'Manuscript Export Succeeded'

Name: Frequency of Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission compared to Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation
Metric: Percentage of 'Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission' out of all 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation'

Name: Percentage of cases where Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission occurs more than once within the same case
Metric: the average of the function base > 1 where base is the number of times `ACTIVITY` == 'Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission'

Name: Ratio of Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission to Plagiarism Originality Report Completed across all cases
Metric: Percentage of 'Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission' out of all 'Plagiarism Originality Report Completed'

Name: Percentage of variants starting with Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission
Metric: Percentage of 'Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission' out of all cases

Name: Frequency of Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission in variants that include at least one reviewer-related activity (e.g., SW-Reviewer Agreed, SW-Reviewer Declined)
Metric: Percentage of 'Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission' out of all 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Percentage of Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission that occur after Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation
Metric: Percentage of 'Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission' out of all 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation'

Name: Number of Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission events appearing in variants that end with Manuscript Export Succeeded during First Look phase
Metric: Number of 'Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission' activities for cases where activity 'Manuscript Export Succeeded' occurs

Name: Percentage of Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission relative to the total number of checklist- or submission-related activities (e.g., SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion, Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation, Revised Manuscript Submission Confirmation)
Metric: Percentage of 'Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission' out of all 'SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion'

Name: Frequency of Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission in cases that undergo multiple revision cycles (i.e., contain both RW- and RSW-prefixed activities)
Metric: Percentage of 'Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission' out of all 'RW-AE Assign Reviewers'

Name: Percentage of Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission occurring in variants with a total activity count exceeding the 75th percentile of variant lengths
Metric: Percentage of 'Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission' out of all cases
